explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.findings: Sources describe documented external accountability practices in 1 source(s). Additional documentation references related practices.
external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Publish third-party audit results, certifications, or regulatory compliance documentation.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release announces SOCi's achievement of ISO 42001 certification, providing evidence for **external accountability**, **fairness**, **governance**, and **transparency**. The certification itself demonstrates external accountability for their AI systems, while the company's commitment to responsible AI growth and the mention of AI systems designed with fairness and accountability support the governance and fairness pillars, respectively. The press release also implies that the AI systems undergo evaluation, contributing to transparency.
relevant_sources.title: SOCi Achieves Prestigious ISO 42001 Certification for Ethical AI Practices

fairness.findings: Sources describe documented fairness practices in 1 source(s). Additional documentation references related practices.
fairness.path_to_improvement: Publish bias testing results, outcome monitoring, or vendor fairness certifications.

governance.findings: Ace Hardware's policy documents mention the use of vendor platforms for profiling and sharing data for targeted advertising. This implies the presence of automated decision-making systems.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This company-owned policy document, "Ace Hardware Privacy Policy - Data Analytics & Personalization," provides evidence for the **governance**, **privacy**, and **transparency** pillars. It supports the privacy pillar by detailing the collection and use of personal information, including sensitive data, for analytics and personalization, and by outlining opt-out mechanisms for automated data collection. The policy also touches on governance and transparency by mentioning the use of vendor platforms for profiling and sharing data for targeted advertising, implying automated decision-making systems.
relevant_sources.title: Ace Hardware Privacy Policy - Data Analytics & Personalization

oversight.findings: Ace Hardware's documentation implies human oversight by highlighting the importance of keeping recruiters in control of the candidate process. This ensures the human element is maintained in AI-assisted processes.
oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

relevant_sources.summary: This blog post provides evidence for the **oversight** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It supports transparency by discussing the use of "conversational AI" and "AI technology" for automated candidate communication. The post also implies human oversight by highlighting the importance of keeping recruiters "in control" of the candidate process, ensuring the human element is maintained.
relevant_sources.title: The Conversation with Ace Hardware's Director of TA: The "aha moment" of using AI

privacy.findings: Ace Hardware's policy documents detail the collection and use of personal information, including sensitive data, for analytics and personalization. These documents also outline opt-out mechanisms for automated data collection.
privacy.path_to_improvement: Publish AI-specific privacy impact assessments or data handling procedures.

summary.overall_findings: Based on 7 publicly available sources, Ace Hardware's published materials address 5 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars. Transparency disclosures describe the use of conversational AI and AI technology for automated candidate communication, while privacy policy documents detail the collection and use of personal information, including sensitive data, for analytics and personalization. Furthermore, governance policy documents mention the use of vendor platforms for profiling and sharing data for targeted advertising. Documented fairness and external accountability practices are also described in the available sources. No qualifying public evidence was found for explainability or oversight.
